title: Find out what happened to the missing scholar
description: A scholar colleague visited Thornhaven two months ago to study ruins. They have not been heard from since. The player must determine their fate.
success_indicators: Learn the scholar's name or identity confirmation from an NPC
Discover the scholar's last known location or action in Thornhaven
Find physical evidence of the scholar's presence
failure_indicators: Evidence that the scholar is dead with no further leads
Player expelled from Thornhaven before gathering information

title: Understand why the village is deserted and fearful
description: The empty streets, closed shutters, and the innkeeper's guarded behavior suggest something has frightened the village. Understanding this context is essential to any other objectives.
success_indicators: An NPC explains the cause of the village's fearful behavior
Player observes direct evidence of the threat or incident
failure_indicators: Village closes off entirely before player gathers more information
